title: Anna University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Anna University Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website of Anna University. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Anna University Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical/Manufacturing/Production, M.E/M.Tech in Design/Product Design & Development Manufacturing /Thermal
qualification.details: Project Associate I: B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical/Manufacturing/Production Project Associate II: M.E/M.Tech in Design/Product Design & Development Manufacturing /Thermal

salary_details.details: Project Associate I: Rs. 20000 Per Month Project Associate II: Rs. 25000 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
